# ctrlplane_resource_provider (Resource)

Manages a resource provider and its resources in Ctrlplane. All resources belonging to the provider are declared as nested blocks and sent as a complete set on every apply, avoiding race conditions that occur when managing individual resources separately.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the resource provider

### Optional

- `metadata` (Map of String) Metadata key-value pairs for the resource provider
- `resource` (Block List) Resources managed by this provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--resource))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the resource provider

<a id="nestedblock--resource"></a>
### Nested Schema for `resource`

Required:

- `identifier` (String) The unique identifier for the resource
- `kind` (String) The kind/type of the resource
- `name` (String) The name of the resource
- `version` (String) The version of the resource

Optional:

- `config` (String) JSON-encoded configuration for the resource. Use jsonencode() to set this value.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Metadata key-value pairs for the resource
